Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Property; For Remedies For Financial Elder Abuse; For Damages; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Frankston appearing for respondent. James Barringer appearing for Tony David. Parties are having settlement communication. Trial will take more than one day. Matter is referred to the Presiding Judge to set for trial. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Property; For Remedies For Financial Elder Abuse; For Damages; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Dec-12-2006 Continued To Mar-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Frankston appearing for respondent. Attorney for petitioner is not in Court. Counsel have agreed on a mediator. Matter is continued to 3/6/07 for status. Mr. Frankston will notify other counsel of the new hearing date. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Karla Davis, CSR#12998. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Property; For Remedies For Financial Elder Abuse; For Damages; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Continued To Dec-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Judd Iversen appearing for Steven M. David. Other counsel is not in court. Mr. Iversen is requesting a continuance for three months. The other trust case is set for evidentary hearing this Friday. Matter is continued to 12/12 for status. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Property; For Remedies For Financial Elder Abuse; For Damages; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jul-19-2006 Continued To Sep-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: John Leutza appearing for Stephen David, respondent. James Barringer appearing for Anthony David, petitioner. Both counsel agree to a continuance. Matter is continued to 9/19. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.
